sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, order_date DATE, amount DECIMAL);
SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 month', order_date) AS bucket, SUM(amount) FROM sales GROUP BY bucket;
UPDATE sales SET order_date = time_bucket(INTERVAL '2 months', order_date) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 week', order_date, INTERVAL '1 day') FROM sales;
